description: Style NoteThis shoe is ideal for those who don't want to compromise when it comes to the stylish look of their footwear - and the best part is that skechers have also paid attention to practicality. The soft footbed takes the natural curve of your feet, the mesh tongue and perforated upper keep your feet fresh and clean, the lace-up upper of the shoes will keep your foot firm on the ground and the highly technical outsole will accelerate your speed when on the go! Product DetailsBrown shoe with central lace-ups, perforations on the forefoot, suede overlays and reinforced suede overlay on the heel collarPadded and meshed tongue and padded innerThick rubber outsoleDurable rubber outsole with circular and terraced grooves on the forefoot and heel Material and CareLeatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
